MCLN EX99 Track Users who scan Location During Selection Configuration Guide Table of Contents Table of Contents TOC \o "1-3" \h \z \u 1 GLOBAL EXTENSION CONTROL CODE SETUP PAGEREF _Toc178931809 \h 3 1.1 Enable System Code C-000 PAGEREF _Toc178931810 \h 3 2 Add additional Custom Codes PAGEREF _Toc178931811 \h 5 2.1 C-000-EX99 Enablement PAGEREF _Toc178931812 \h 5 GLOBAL EXTENSION CONTROL CODE SETUP Enable System Code C-000 Navigate to the System Codes (Configuration) UI. If system code C-000 (Global Extension Control) does not yet exist, click Add. Populate the following information: Note: The checkbox “System code parameters exist” will auto populate upon completion of subsequent steps for adding parameters, and it is un-editable to the user. Click Save. Next, click the Code ID’s Action Button The System Code ID’s screen is displayed. Click ADD. Populate the following information provided above. Click SAVE to save the Code ID. Next, Click the Parameters Action button located on the bottom right of the screen to Navigate back to System Code Parameters screen. System Code parameters Screen is displayed. Click ADD button. Populate the following information provided above. Click SAVE. Click on the Parameters tab. Check the box to enable all custom functionality. Click SAVE. Add additiona l C ustom C odes 1. Navigate to System Codes UI in WM. We will need to add Custom code C-000-E X 99 if it has not been added. 2. Search for system code C-000: Use the Custom Code drop-down option under the Record Type menu. Type in 000 for Code Type. Click apply to search. 3. Click the Checkbox to select the system code. 4. Click on the Code ID's action button in the lower right of the menu. 5. Click ADD action button. 6. Populate the fields with the information provided in the screenshot above. 7. Click SAVE. C-000-EX 99 Enablement 1. Click the Blue Parameters Tab. 2. Located next to the DETAILS tab. 3. Check the box to enable all custom functionality. 4. C lick SAVE.

[Document: MCLN EX99 Track Users who scan Location During Selection Configuration Guide]

MCLN EX99 Track Users who scan Location During Selection Configuration Guide Table of Contents Table of Contents  1 GLOBAL EXTENSION CONTROL CODE SETUP  1.1 Enable System Code C-000  2 Add additional Custom Codes  2.1 C-000-EX99 Enablement  GLOBAL EXTENSION CONTROL CODE SETUP Enable System Code C-000 Navigate to the System Codes (Configuration) UI. If system code C-000 (Global Extension Control) does not yet exist, click Add. Populate the following information: Note: The checkbox “System code parameters exist” will auto populate upon completion of subsequent steps for adding parameters, and it is un-editable to the user. Click Save. Next, click the Code ID’s Action Button The System Code ID’s screen is displayed. Click ADD. Populate the following information provided above. Click SAVE to save the Code ID. Next, Click the Parameters Action button located on the bottom right of the screen to Navigate back to System Code Parameters screen. System Code parameters Screen is displayed. Click ADD button. Populate the following information provided above. Click SAVE. Click on the Parameters tab. Check the box to enable all custom functionality. Click SAVE. Add additiona l C ustom C odes 1. Navigate to System Codes UI in WM. We will need to add Custom code C-000-E X 99 if it has not been added. 2. Search for system code C-000: Use the Custom Code drop-down option under the Record Type menu. Type in 000 for Code Type. Click apply to search. 3. Click the Checkbox to select the system code. 4. Click on the Code ID's action button in the lower right of the menu. 5. Click ADD action button. 6. Populate the fields with the information provided in the screenshot above. 7. Click SAVE. C-000-EX 99 Enablement 1. Click the Blue Parameters Tab. 2. Located next to the DETAILS tab. 3. Check the box to enable all custom functionality. 4. C lick SAVE.
